hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什预计将在央行利率前景中保留“点”；【CRYPTO】尽管特朗普签署的伊朗协议提振股市，但在美联储采取鹰派态度后，比特币和以太币下跌；【CRYPTO】实时市场：由于降息希望破灭，比特币和以太坊 ETF 合计损失 1.11 亿美元。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh expected to withhold 'dot' from central bank's interest rate outlook
items.summary: The central bank's Federal Open Market Committee is set to release its quarterly update of where individual officials expect interest rates to head.
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什预计将在央行利率前景中保留“点”
items.summary_zh: 央行联邦公开市场委员会将发布个人官员预期利率走向的季度更新。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether slide after a hawkish Fed, even as Trump's signed Iran deal lifts stocks
items.summary: The Fed held rates but signaled it is more worried about inflation than growth in Chair Kevin Warsh's first meeting.
items.title_zh: 尽管特朗普签署的伊朗协议提振股市，但在美联储采取鹰派态度后，比特币和以太币下跌
items.summary_zh: 美联储维持利率不变，但在主席凯文·沃什(Kevin Warsh)的第一次会议上表示，它更担心通胀而不是经济增长。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin and ether ETFs lost $111 million combined as rate-cut hopes died
items.summary: Total market value has held flat near $2.26 trillion since Tuesday, with the recovery losing momentum after the Fed killed rate-cut hopes and spot ETFs swung back to outflows.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：由于降息希望破灭，比特币和以太坊 ETF 合计损失 1.11 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 自周二以来，总市值一直保持在 2.26 万亿美元附近，在美联储降息希望破灭、现货 ETF 重新开始流出后，复苏失去了动力。

items.title: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
items.summary: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席
items.summary_zh: 冈拉克表示，沃什的立场降低了过度宽松货币政策的风险，这种政策可能会重新引发通胀并推高长期借贷成本。

items.title: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
items.summary: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.
items.title_zh: 由于几位成员暗示 2026 年加息，主席沃什放弃给出利率预测
items.summary_zh: 预计联邦基金利率到 2026 年底将达到 3.8%，比当前目标范围高出四分之一个百分点。

items.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in April.
items.title_zh: 主席沃什大幅改变了美联储的利率声明。这是更改的内容
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储 4 月份上一次政策制定会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: Crypto markets wobble after hawkish Fed outlook in Kevin Warsh’s first FOMC meeting
items.summary: Most major cryptocurrencies fell between 1% and 3% following the decision, with bitcoin dropping to $64,150.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）在首次联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）会议上发表鹰派美联储前景后，加密货币市场出现波动
items.summary_zh: 该决定公布后，大多数主要加密货币下跌 1% 至 3%，其中比特币跌至 64,150 美元。

items.title: Fed holds rates steady, pares down statement to remove cutting bias
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its interest rate decision.
items.title_zh: 美联储维持利率稳定，削减声明以消除降息偏见
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了利率决定。

items.title: More united Fed board seen at Warsh's first meeting, according to Kalshi traders
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi largely forecast a unanimous decision among FOMC members at Wednesday's meeting, after April's divided vote.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员表示，沃什的第一次会议上美联储董事会更加团结
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员在很大程度上预测，在 4 月份的投票结果存在分歧后，联邦公开市场委员会 (FOMC) 成员将在周三的会议上做出一致决定。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: The bond market is flashing a clear signal on interest rates. Bitcoin bulls should take note
items.summary: The bond market is sending a signal that complicates prospects of a near-term bitcoin bull run.
items.title_zh: 债券市场正在释放明确的利率信号。比特币多头应该注意
items.summary_zh: 债券市场正在发出一个信号，使近期比特币牛市的前景变得更加复杂。

items.title: Strategy's STRC preferred stock hits a record low below par
items.summary: The slide has paused the above-par share sales Strategy uses to fund bitcoin purchases, and it is the same stock whose dividends forced the company's first BTC sale this month.
items.title_zh: Strategy的STRC优先股创历史新低，低于面值
items.summary_zh: 此次下滑导致该公司暂停了用于为比特币购买提供资金的高于标准股票销售，而正是这支股票的股息迫使该公司本月首次出售了比特币。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 合作伙伴网络简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出合作伙伴网络，投资 1.5 亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其在现实世界的部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's tempted to bet against SpaceX, but passes on expensive options
items.summary: Burry argued the company's market capitalization had reached levels that dwarf many established businesses and fortunes.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，他很想做空 SpaceX，但放弃了昂贵的选择
items.summary_zh: 伯里认为，该公司的市值已达到令许多老牌企业和财富相形见绌的水平。

items.title: Gunfire heard at Niger capital's airport
items.summary: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
items.title_zh: 尼日尔首都机场传出枪声
items.summary_zh: 尼日尔十年来一直在与激进的伊斯兰叛乱分子作战，今年一月，疑似圣战分子袭击了同一机场。

items.title: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC
items.summary: Japan needs to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined it since World War Two, Shinjiro Koizumi says.
items.title_zh: 日本防卫大臣小泉纯一郎告诉 BBC，日本加强防卫对于防止战争“至关重要”
items.summary_zh: 小泉进二郎表示，日本需要重新审视自第二次世界大战以来定义的和平主义姿态。

items.title: In Southeast Asia, Switching to Solar Offers Relief from Energy Crisis Caused by Iran War
items.summary: Homeowners and businesses in the region, which relies heavily on imported oil, are installing rooftop solar panels to reduce the sting of soaring energy costs.
items.title_zh: 在东南亚，改用太阳能可以缓解伊朗战争造成的能源危机
items.summary_zh: 该地区严重依赖进口石油，房主和企业正在屋顶安装太阳能电池板，以减轻能源成本飙升的影响。

items.title: Bahrain Revoked Their Citizenship, and Then Tried to Expel Them to Iran
items.summary: Amid the war with Iran, Bahrain has stripped 69 people of their citizenship, including children, accusing them of disloyalty and rendering them stateless.
items.title_zh: 巴林撤销了他们的公民身份，然后试图将他们驱逐到伊朗
items.summary_zh: 在与伊朗的战争中，巴林剥夺了 69 人的公民身份，其中包括儿童，指责他们不忠并使他们成为无国籍人。

items.title: Finland Lifts a Nuclear Weapons Ban, Eyeing an Uncertain World
items.summary: The Nordic country, which shares an 830-mile border with Russia, said the move would strengthen the NATO alliance, which it joined three years ago.
items.title_zh: 芬兰解除核武器禁令，着眼于不确定的世界
items.summary_zh: 这个与俄罗斯接壤830英里的北欧国家表示，此举将加强其三年前加入的北约联盟。

items.title: CME chief executive says company plans to sue CFTC after perpetual futures approval
items.summary: Kalshi's perpetual futures product did not meet the Dodd-Frank Act's definition of a "swap" and should not have been approved, Terrence Duffy said.
items.title_zh: 芝商所首席执行官表示，公司计划在永久期货批准后起诉美国商品期货交易委员会
items.summary_zh: Terrence Duffy 表示，Kalshi 的永续期货产品不符合《多德弗兰克法案》对“掉期”的定义，不应获得批准。

items.title: CME Group to sue CFTC over approval of perpetual futures, CEO tells CNBC
items.summary: CME Group CEO Duffy said perpetual futures should be classified as swaps under the Dodd-Frank Act, which would form the basis of the lawsuit.
items.title_zh: 芝商所首席执行官告诉 CNBC，将就永续期货的批准起诉美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC)
items.summary_zh: 芝商所首席执行官达菲表示，根据《多德弗兰克法案》，永续期货应被归类为掉期产品，这将构成诉讼的基础。

items.title: Strategy’s STRC preferred stock closes day 11% under par at $89
items.summary: Wednesday's close of $89 appears to be the lowest on record since the stock was first issued in 2025.
items.title_zh: Strategy 的 STRC 优先股收盘价为 89 美元，较面值低 11%
items.summary_zh: 周三收盘价为 89 美元，似乎是该股自 2025 年首次发行以来的最低记录。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Aster (ASTER)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #47.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Aster (ASTER)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 47。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #138.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：Plasma (XPL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 138 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #10.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 10。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #591.

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#591。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #7.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Solana (SOL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第七。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.title_zh: 支持欧洲确保值得信赖的人工智能生态系统的工作
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于人工智能内容透明度的实践准则，推进来源标准和工具以帮助人们理解人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
items.title_zh: 从 Hugging Face Hub 到 Strands Agents 和 LeRobot 的机器人硬件

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Prediction market traders speculate Anthropic will restore access quickly to AI model after Trump admin directed it to limit reach
items.summary: Traders think it's more likely than not that access is restored by July 1.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员推测，在特朗普政府指示限制范围后，Anthropic 将迅速恢复对人工智能模型的访问
items.summary_zh: 交易员认为，访问很有可能在 7 月 1 日之前恢复。

items.title: Buying bitcoin below its 200-week average has historically delivered over 100% in median returns, Kraken says
items.summary: Bitcoin briefly slipped below its 200-week moving average twice in the past two weeks, a rare event that Kraken says has historically marked strong entry points for buyers.
items.title_zh: Kraken 表示，历史上以低于 200 周平均水平购买比特币的中值回报率超过 100%
items.summary_zh: 过去两周，比特币曾两次短暂跌破 200 周移动平均线，Kraken 表示，这一罕见事件历来标志着买家的强劲入场点。

items.title: Next bull run will be slower, less volatile as investors' crypto appetite evolves, Bitwise CIO says
items.summary: Long-time bitcoin bull Matt Hougan told CoinDesk that during this bear market and with ‘doubts swirling’, investors have found ‘it easier to reach for something more tangible:’ stablecoins and tokenization.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 首席信息官表示，随着投资者对加密货币的兴趣不断变化，下一次牛市将会更加缓慢、波动性较小
items.summary_zh: 长期看好比特币的马特·霍根 (Matt Hougan) 告诉 CoinDesk，在这次熊市和“疑虑重重”的情况下，投资者发现“更容易获得更切实的东西”：稳定币和代币化。

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.title_zh: 近乎自主的人工智能化学家改善了药物化学中具有挑战性的反应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Molecule.one 展示了一位近乎自主的 AI 化学家如何使用 GPT-5.4 改进关键的制药反应，从而推进药物化学研究。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
items.title_zh: LifeSciBench 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 LifeSciBench，这是一个由专家撰写、专家评审的基准，用于评估人工智能系统如何处理现实世界的生命科学研究任务和决策。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.title_zh: 通过模拟部署来预测发布前的模型行为
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 引入了部署模拟，这是一种在部署前使用真实对话数据预测 AI 模型行为的方法，以提高安全性和评估准确性。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: CME Group's Terry Duffy to step down in 2027, CFO Lynne Fitzpatrick to become CEO
items.summary: Duffy, 67, will transition to executive chairman effective March 1, 2027, the company said Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 芝商所 (CME) 特里·达菲 (Terry Duffy) 将于 2027 年辞职，首席财务官林恩·菲茨帕特里克 (Lynne Fitzpatrick) 将出任首席执行官
items.summary_zh: 该公司周三表示，现年 67 岁的达菲将于 2027 年 3 月 1 日起担任执行董事长。

items.title: China pushes for AI safety as G7 summit wraps up without Beijing
items.summary: China included artificial intelligence in its global governance whitepaper published Wednesday, and said Beijing was speeding up cooperation efforts.
items.title_zh: 七国集团峰会在没有北京的情况下结束，中国推动人工智能安全
items.summary_zh: 中国将人工智能纳入周三发布的全球治理白皮书，并表示北京正在加快合作步伐。

items.title: What's in the US-Iran agreement?
items.summary: The 14-paragraph memo includes an end to fighting, an agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon, and a $300bn redevelopment package for Iran.
items.title_zh: 美伊协议有哪些内容？
items.summary_zh: 这份共 14 段的备忘录包括结束战斗、达成伊朗永远不会拥有核武器的协议，以及为伊朗提供 3000 亿美元的重建计划。

items.title: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
items.summary: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.
items.title_zh: 以色列民族主义者无视规则，耶路撒冷圣地的现状受到威胁
items.summary_zh: 以色列民族主义者越来越多地蔑视关于信仰如何共享阿克萨清真寺大院的公约。

items.title: Search for six-year-old Ebola patient after armed men storm DR Congo hospital
items.summary: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.
items.title_zh: 武装人员冲进刚果民主共和国医院后寻找六岁埃博拉患者
items.summary_zh: 在当前的疫情爆发期间，由于错误信息和恐惧，卫生设施受到攻击。

items.title: Serial killer who murdered eight women in Long Island town imprisoned for life
items.summary: In fiery exchange, judge sentenced him to three life sentences plus 25 years to life on four other charges, all running consecutively.
items.title_zh: 在长岛镇谋杀八名妇女的连环杀手被终身监禁
items.summary_zh: 在激烈的交锋中，法官判处他三项无期徒刑，外加其他四项罪名，判处 25 年无期徒刑，所有罪名都是连续执行的。

items.title: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
items.summary: Three Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have passed the US blockade line in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data shows.
items.title_zh: 伊朗派遣满载石油的油轮突破美国军事封锁
items.summary_zh: 船舶追踪数据显示，三艘满载原油的伊朗油轮已通过美国在阿曼湾的封锁线。

items.title: The Ring and Lilo & Stitch actress Daveigh Chase dies aged 35
items.summary: Chase died from sepsis following a bout with meningitis in a Los Angeles hospital, her longtime manager told the BBC.
items.title_zh: 《指环王》和《星际宝贝》女演员戴维·蔡斯去世，享年 35 岁
items.summary_zh: 蔡斯的长期经理告诉英国广播公司，蔡斯在洛杉矶一家医院因脑膜炎而死于败血症。

items.title: Trump says he will visit India as frosty relationship with Modi thaws
items.summary: Trump made the announcement during chat where he also vowed to protect India.
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，随着与莫迪的冰冷关系解冻，他将访问印度
items.summary_zh: 特朗普在聊天中宣布了这一消息，他还誓言要保护印度。

items.title: UN experts demand Iranians free Foremans
items.summary: They said proceedings against Lindsay and Craig Foreman had been marked by grave irregularities.

items.summary_zh: 他们表示，针对林赛和克雷格·福尔曼的诉讼程序存在严重违规行为。

items.title: Team Medic Recounts Iran’s ‘Stressful’ World Cup Debut in L.A.
items.summary: A member of Iran’s medical team says the team endured delays, multiple security searches and a rushed exit, frustrating players and officials.

items.title: Trump Angrily Defends Iran Deal and Reveals, Again, His Obsession With Obama
items.summary: President Trump denied that the United States would be part of a $300 billion rebuilding fund for Iran and argued that his agreement was better than the one Barack Obama struck in 2015.
items.title_zh: 特朗普愤怒地捍卫伊朗协议并再次透露他对奥巴马的痴迷

items.title: Ukraine Tries to Cut Off Crimea, Choking Russian Supply Routes
items.summary: Scores of targeted attacks against supply routes, part of what Kyiv calls a “logistics lockdown,” has caused gasoline shortages.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰试图切断克里米亚，切断俄罗斯供应路线
items.summary_zh: 数十起针对供应路线的有针对性的攻击（基辅所谓的“物流封锁”的一部分）导致了汽油短缺。

items.title: How Ecuador’s Andes Created a Language of Its Own
items.summary: In Ecuador’s highlands, a seamless mix of Kichwa and Spanish creates a language that bends grammar, adds melody and goes unnoticed by many who speak it every day.
items.title_zh: 厄瓜多尔的安第斯山脉如何创造自己的语言
items.summary_zh: 在厄瓜多尔的高地，基奇瓦语和西班牙语的无缝混合创造了一种语言，它改变了语法，增加了旋律，却被许多每天说这种语言的人忽视了。

items.title: After a Bitter Split, European Leaders Play Nice With Trump
items.summary: A peace framework with Iran, and hope for cooperation with Ukraine, softened the tone on Tuesday at a Group of 7 gathering in France.
items.title_zh: 痛苦分裂后，欧洲领导人与特朗普相处融洽
items.summary_zh: 周二在法国举行的七国集团会议上，与伊朗的和平框架以及与乌克兰合作的希望软化了基调。

items.title: XRP slips 4% below $1.20 after breakout rally stalls near key resistance
items.summary: Heavy selling pushed XRP back through a closely watched support level, though buyers stepped in above $1.17 to prevent a deeper pullback.
items.title_zh: 在突破反弹在关键阻力位附近停滞后，XRP 下跌 4%，跌破 1.20 美元
items.summary_zh: 尽管买家进入 1.17 美元上方以防止进一步回调，但大量抛售将 XRP 推回了备受关注的支撑位。

items.title: Kentucky targets prediction markets, puts red state in potential clash with Trump team
items.summary: President Donald Trump has taken the stance that states have no business with firms like Kalshi and Polymarket, and now a staunch GOP state is defying that view.

items.title: Fidelity joins Wall Street's race to manage stablecoin reserves
items.summary: Following State Street, Fidelity is targeting reserve assets that underpin the expanding stablecoin market.

items.summary_zh: 继道富银行之后，富达将目标瞄准了支撑不断扩大的稳定币市场的储备资产。

items.title: Tether winds down aUSDT stablecoin and Alloy platform to sharpen focus
items.summary: Tether said it is winding down the 'Alloy by Tether' platform and discontinuing support for aUSDT, a stablecoin over-collateralized by XAUT.

items.title: Kentucky files lawsuits against prediction market platforms Kalshi and Polymarket
items.summary: The lawsuits claim prediction market platforms have been offering unlicensed sports gambling in the state while bypassing local regulations.

items.summary_zh: 这些诉讼声称预测市场平台一直在该州提供未经许可的体育博彩，同时绕过当地法规。

items.title: Ark Invest buys $18 million worth of Coinbase shares, offloads $29 million in Robinhood
items.summary: The trades came as Coinbase's stock closed down 2.57% at $164.92 on Wednesday, while Robinhood gained 8.78%.

items.summary_zh: 此次交易发生之际，Coinbase 股价周三收盘下跌 2.57%，至 164.92 美元，而 Robinhood 上涨 8.78%。
